posts.author: JTR (Jason Trier)
posts.cookedHtml: In the Files column, we can upload .GIFS and they will playback in the viewer. It would awesome to have Video Playback as well. As we use this tool for onboarding new hires and or process related work. It allows individuals to click live on a video instead of having to download, or go to an external resource for it.
